module simd_load32_lane.0.wasm
assert_return v128.load32_lane_0 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000010203040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_2 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000203040500000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_3 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000003040506
assert_return v128.load32_lane_0_offset_0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_1_offset_1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000010203040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_2_offset_2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000203040500000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_3_offset_3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000003040506
assert_return v128.load32_lane_0_align_1 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_0_align_2 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_0_align_4 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010203000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_1_align_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000010203040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_1_align_2 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000010203040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_1_align_4 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000010203040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_2_align_1 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000203040500000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_2_align_2 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000203040500000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_2_align_4 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000203040500000000
assert_return v128.load32_lane_3_align_1 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000003040506
assert_return v128.load32_lane_3_align_2 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000003040506
assert_return v128.load32_lane_3_align_4 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000003040506
assert_invalid simd_load32_lane.1.wasm
assert_invalid simd_load32_lane.2.wasm
assert_invalid simd_load32_lane.3.wasm
